sys_atf_step.description:
Impersonate the user: Beth Anglin with user Id: beth.anglin
Warning: Impersonating an existing user may cause unexpected behavior for this test. Avoid potential issues by adding a 'Create a User' step instead See the documentation for Test Design Considerations
sys_atf_step.warning_message: Warning: Impersonating an existing user may cause unexpected behavior for this test. Avoid potential issues by adding a 'Create a User' step instead See the documentation for Test Design Considerations
